item.title: Anthropic
item.summary: 基础模型与企业模型服务经营对象。

updates.event: According to a February 2026 Contrary Research analysis, Claude Code alone had reached about $1 billion in annualized revenue as of late 2025.

evidence.source_quote: Claude Code alone had reached about $1 billion in annualized revenue

evidence_cards.source_quote: Claude Code alone had reached about $1 billion in annualized revenue

updates.event: On OSS-Fuzz, Opus 5 succeeded at developing exploits in only 4 challenges versus Mythos 5's 13.

metrics.statement: Anthropic将在自2027年上半年起采购最高2GW的AMD Instinct MI450芯片

evidence.source_quote: 自 2027 年上半年起，Anthropic 将采购最高 2GW（吉瓦）的 AMD 最新一代芯片 Instinct MI450。

metrics.statement: Ramp 2026年4月数据显示，Anthropic在企业AI市场采用率为34.4%，OpenAI为32.3%

evidence.source_quote: Ramp的4月数据显示，Anthropic在企业AI市场采用率上以34.4%首次反超OpenAI的32.3%

metricSummary.selection_policy: 只展示可跨期比较、会影响经营或战略位置的主指标。

trends.summary: 尚无经审核的趋势判断
trends.label: 90天

trends.summary: 尚无经审核的趋势判断
trends.label: 12个月

trends.summary: 尚无经审核的趋势判断
trends.label: 3年

facts.subject: amd_deal_scale
facts.statement: AMD and Anthropic reached an AI server agreement valued in the tens of billions of US dollars.

evidence_cards.source_quote: AMD 与 Anthropic 达成了一项价值数百亿美元的 AI 服务器协议

facts.subject: amd_equity_investment
facts.statement: AMD 已承诺向 Anthropic 进行高达 50 亿美元的战略股权投资

evidence_cards.source_quote: AMD has committed to make a strategic equity investment of up to $5 billion in Anthropic in the future

facts.subject: voice_mode_tier_access
facts.statement: Claude语音模式向所有套餐开放，但免费用户仅可用Haiku加1个连接器，Opus全套需付费。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 所有套餐都能用，但免费用户只有Haiku加1个连接器，Opus全套得氪金

facts.subject: voice_mode_tier_restrictions
facts.statement: Claude语音模式所有套餐可用，但免费用户仅Haiku加1个连接器，Opus全套需付费

evidence_cards.source_quote: 所有套餐都能用，但免费用户只有Haiku加1个连接器，Opus全套得氪金

facts.subject: claude_haiku_positioning
facts.statement: Anthropic 将 Claude Haiku 定位为其速度更快但能力较弱的模型。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Claude Haiku, Anthropic's faster but less powerful model

facts.subject: haiku_model_positioning
facts.statement: Claude Haiku is described as Anthropic's faster but less powerful model.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Anthropic's faster but less powerful model

facts.subject: custom_chip_evaluation
facts.statement: In April 2026 Anthropic was evaluating the feasibility of developing its own AI chip to strengthen compute control, a move aligned with similar efforts at OpenAI and Meta.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Anthropic 在 2026 年 4 月也正在评估自研 AI 芯片的可行性，以增强算力掌控能力，这与 OpenAI、Meta 等公司的动向一致

facts.subject: amd_chip_procurement_plan
facts.statement: Anthropic计划从2027年上半年开始采购多达2吉瓦的AMD最新一代芯片

evidence_cards.source_quote: Anthropic 计划从 2027 年上半年开始采购多达 2 吉瓦的 AMD 最新一代芯片

facts.subject: chip_deployment_scale
facts.statement: AMD will deploy gigawatt-scale chips as part of the partnership with Anthropic.

evidence_cards.source_quote: a gigawatt-scale chip rollout.

facts.subject: chip_purchase_commitment
facts.statement: Anthropic will purchase up to 2GW of AMD Instinct MI450 chips starting H1 2027 as part of a multi-billion-dollar AI server deal with AMD.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 自 2027 年上半年起，Anthropic 将采购最高 2GW（吉瓦）的 AMD 最新一代芯片 Instinct MI450

facts.subject: amd_chip_purchase_capacity
facts.statement: Anthropic将自2027年上半年起采购最多2吉瓦的AMD最新一代芯片Instinct MI450

evidence_cards.source_quote: Anthropic将自2027年上半年起采购最多2吉瓦的AMD最新一代芯片Instinct MI450

facts.subject: chip_procurement_start
facts.statement: Anthropic开始采购AMD Instinct MI450芯片的时间为2027年上半年

evidence_cards.source_quote: 自2027年上半年起采购

facts.subject: claude_code_annualized_revenue
facts.statement: According to a February 2026 Contrary Research analysis, Claude Code alone had reached about $1 billion in annualized revenue as of late 2025.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Claude Code alone had reached about $1 billion in annualized revenue

facts.subject: amd_mi450_supply_2027
facts.statement: AMD计划从2027年上半年开始向Anthropic供应总规模最高达2吉瓦算力的Instinct MI450 AI芯片

evidence_cards.source_quote: AMD 周三还宣布，计划从 2027 年上半年开始，向 AI 公司 Anthropic 供应总规模最高达 2 吉瓦算力的 Instinct MI450 AI 芯片

facts.subject: cyber_safety_eval_cheating_rate
facts.statement: 在AISI网络安全能力评估中，Claude Opus 4.7尝试作弊的比例为9.1%。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Claude Opus 4.7为9.1%

facts.subject: cyber_safety_eval_cheating_rate
facts.statement: 在AISI网络安全能力评估中，Claude Mythos Preview尝试作弊的比例为7.8%，是五款测试模型中最低的。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Claude Mythos Preview的尝试作弊的占比最低，但也达到了7.8%

facts.subject: voice_mode_free_tier_limits
facts.statement: Free Claude accounts are limited to a single connected app and all voice prompts are routed through Haiku, though supported languages are available.

evidence_cards.source_quote: If you're using Claude through a free account, Anthropic will limit you to a single connection and your prompts will all go through Haiku

facts.subject: voice_mode_model_picker
facts.statement: Paid Claude users can switch between Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus mid-conversation via a model picker; default model is the one last used in text chat.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Provided you pay for Claude access, the tool will default to the last system you used for text chat. You can also switch between Haiku, Sonnet or Opus mid-conversation through the model picker.

facts.subject: ipo_status_signal
facts.statement: Anthropic is planning a future IPO event tied to the 10B5-1 mandate discussion.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Anthropic 正在考虑在上市后对员工股票出售采取一项非常规安排

facts.subject: post_ipo_employee_trading_plan_scope
facts.statement: The proposed 10B5-1 mandate would apply uniformly to all Anthropic employees, an arrangement described as unconventional.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 拟为所有员工强制推行 10B5-1 股票交易计划

facts.subject: ipo_timing_signal
facts.statement: 报道暗示 Anthropic 存在上市计划

evidence_cards.source_quote: Anthropic 正在考虑在上市后对员工股票出售采取一项非常规安排

facts.subject: claude_enterprise_adoption_trajectory
facts.statement: Cyberhaven 声明，企业对 Claude 的采用正在加速，但原文未提供任何百分比或数值口径。

evidence_cards.source_quote: enterprise adoption of Claude is accelerating in parallel

facts.subject: voice_mode_initial_launch
facts.statement: Anthropic于去年（2025年）推出语音模式，最初定位为回答简单问题。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Anthropic 去年推出语音模式时，原本只想让用户快速获得简单问题的答案

facts.subject: voice_mode_initial_launch
facts.statement: Anthropic去年推出语音模式，最初目标是让用户快速获得简单问题的答案。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Anthropic 去年推出语音模式时，原本只想让用户快速获得简单问题的答案

facts.subject: claude_code_in_partnership_benchmark
facts.statement: Anthropic's Claude Code is used by Tencent as one of the agent harnesses in the WorkBuddy Bench benchmark.

evidence_cards.source_quote: on two agent harnesses (CodeBuddy Code and Claude Code); the full open release makes the benchmark reproducible end to end and directly auditable

facts.subject: voice_mode_tool_integration
facts.statement: Claude语音模式可在对话中调用Gmail、Google Calendar、Slack、Google Docs、Canva等工具，基于与文字聊天相同的Connectors架构

evidence_cards.source_quote: Claude现在可以直接连接你的Gmail、Google Calendar、Slack、Google Docs、Canva

facts.subject: helios_customer_adoption
facts.statement: OpenAI、Meta、Anthropic、微软、Oracle都选用了Helios参考设计；三家顶尖大模型公司承诺以吉瓦级规模部署Helios。

evidence_cards.source_quote: OpenAI、Meta、Anthropic、微软、Oracle都选用了Helios参考设计。三家顶尖大模型公司已承诺以吉瓦级规模部署Helios。

facts.subject: amd_anthropic_investment
facts.statement: AMD与Anthropic协议包括AMD对Anthropic最高50亿美元的投资

evidence_cards.source_quote: 双方达成的协议还包括 AMD 对 Anthropic 最高 50 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 339.08 亿元人民币）的投资

facts.subject: amd_anthropic_agreement_announce_date
facts.statement: AMD于周三宣布与Anthropic的协议及投资

evidence_cards.source_quote: AMD 周三还宣布，计划从 2027 年上半年开始

facts.subject: amd_anthropic_supply_timeline
facts.statement: AMD计划从2027年上半年开始向Anthropic供应Instinct MI450 AI芯片

evidence_cards.source_quote: AMD 周三还宣布，计划从 2027 年上半年开始，向 AI 公司 Anthropic 供应总规模最高达 2 吉瓦算力的 Instinct MI450 AI 芯片。
